experiments.purpose: (Phase 1b backfill) ~Copyable/borrowing investigation; details in main.swift header
Verify whether Swift shorthand `[T]` / `[K:V]` syntax can resolve to user-defined Array/Dictionary types that shadow stdlib, or whether the shorthand is hardcoded to Swift.Array / Swift.Dictionary
experiments.statusDetail: Shorthand `[T]` always means Swift.Array<T>; cannot resolve to a shadowing custom Array. Verified via 5 variants + Swift compiler source (KnownStdlibTypes.def line 51, TypeCheckType.cpp resolveArrayType:5584). Same hardcoding for Dictionary (`[K:V]`) and Optional (`T?`).
